case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ARACELY ELIZABETH VALLE MELGAR

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARACELY ELIZABETH VALLE MELGAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE; DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
